Premium State of Illinois Thin Blue Line Decals

Show your support for Illinois law enforcement with our durable state-shaped thin blue line decals. Illinois has more than 100 law enforcement agencies, and these premium vinyl decals provide a meaningful way to display your support for the brave men and women who serve and protect Illinois communities. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Our State of Illinois decals are manufactured from high-quality vinyl material designed for both indoor and outdoor applications. Each decal features the distinctive thin blue line design within the precise outline of Illinois, creating a powerful symbol of support that looks professional on vehicles, windows, walls, and other smooth surfaces.

Available in multiple sizes and finishes, these state decals are precision-cut to maintain the accurate proportions of Illinois geography while ensuring optimal adhesion and long-lasting durability. The matte vinyl finish provides a professional appearance that resists fading and weathering.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom State of Illinois Decal Order Process

Ordering your State of Illinois thin blue line decals is straightforward and efficient. Our streamlined process ensures you receive exactly what you need to show your support for Illinois law enforcement.

Design Selection Process

Choose from our standard State of Illinois thin blue line design featuring the classic blue stripe pattern within the state outline. Select your preferred size and quantity using our online configurator. The design maintains precise Illinois state proportions regardless of size selection.

Payment Processing

Complete your order using our secure checkout system. We accept major credit cards and process payments immediately upon order confirmation. You'll receive an email confirmation with your order details and production timeline.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your State of Illinois decal production status through our customer portal. You'll receive updates when your order enters production, completes manufacturing, and ships to your specified address.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

State of Illinois Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our production schedule ensures your State of Illinois decals are manufactured efficiently while maintaining quality standards. Production time begins after order approval and does not include shipping time to your location.

3 Business Day Standard Production

Our most popular turnaround option provides free standard production for State of Illinois decals. This timeline works well for most custom orders and provides excellent value. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day.

Production time starts from order approval completion. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, production begins after you approve the final proof. This ensures your State of Illinois decals meet your exact specifications before manufacturing.

Emergency and same-day rush production may be available for urgent State of Illinois decal orders. Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5250 to discuss rush options and availability for your specific requirements.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for State of Illinois Decals

State of Illinois thin blue line decals are available with different cutting methods to meet your application needs and installation preferences.

Die Cut State of Illinois Decals

Die cutting creates State of Illinois decals with no background material, cutting precisely around the state outline. The decal includes only the Illinois shape with the thin blue line design, allowing the underlying surface to show through. This option works well for vehicle applications and window installations.

Kiss Cut State of Illinois Decals

Kiss cutting cuts through the vinyl layer while leaving the backing paper intact, making removal and application easier. The State of Illinois decal peels away from a larger backing sheet, providing better handling during installation while maintaining the precise state outline.

Transfer Cut State of Illinois Decals

Transfer cutting provides State of Illinois decals with a transfer tape overlay for precise positioning during installation. This method works well for detailed applications where exact placement is critical, allowing you to position the entire decal before removing the transfer tape.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for State of Illinois Decals

State of Illinois thin blue line decals use our standard design template featuring the precise Illinois state outline with the traditional thin blue line pattern. Our artwork specifications ensure optimal print quality and accurate state proportions.

Standard Design Specifications

The State of Illinois design maintains accurate geographic proportions scaled to your selected size. The thin blue line pattern is positioned appropriately within the state outline to create a balanced and recognizable design that honors Illinois law enforcement.

Color and Finish Options

State of Illinois decals are produced in our standard thin blue line color scheme featuring black, blue, and white elements. The matte vinyl finish provides durability while reducing glare and maintaining a professional appearance on various surfaces.

Size Accuracy Guidelines

State decals are measured at the highest or widest point and proportioned to accurate Illinois state dimensions. Due to precise geographic scaling, State of Illinois decals cannot be combined with other state decals to create a complete United States map, as each state maintains its individual proportional accuracy.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

State of Illinois Decal Shipping Information

Your State of Illinois thin blue line decals ship separately from production time, and we provide multiple delivery options to meet your timeline requirements.

Shipping Methods

State of Illinois decals ship via USPS, UPS, or FedEx depending on your location and selected delivery speed. Ground shipping provides economical delivery for most orders, while expedited options are available when you need faster delivery.

Shipping Time Expectations

Standard ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days after your State of Illinois decals complete production. Expedited shipping options can reduce delivery time to 1-3 business days. Exact shipping time depends on your location relative to our Minnesota facility.

Important Shipping Notes

Shipping time is separate from production time. Your total time to receive State of Illinois decals includes both production time and shipping time. We provide tracking information once your order ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress to your specified address.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installing Your State of Illinois Decal

Proper installation ensures your State of Illinois thin blue line decal creates a strong bond and maintains its appearance for years. Follow these steps for professional results on vehicles, windows, walls, and other smooth surfaces.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the installation surface thoroughly with warm water and soap, or use rubbing alcohol for best results. Remove all dirt, debris, and moisture that could weaken adhesion. Wipe away cleaning product residue with a dry cloth before applying your State of Illinois decal.

Positioning the State of Illinois Decal

Before removing the backing, tape your decal in position and measure to ensure proper alignment. For State of Illinois decals, consider the natural orientation of the state outline when positioning on vehicles or other surfaces.

Applying Your Decal

Remove the backing paper and apply the State of Illinois decal starting from one edge. Use a plastic applicator or credit card to smooth the decal, working from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles. Apply firm, consistent pressure across the entire Illinois outline.

Removing Transfer Tape

If your State of Illinois decal includes transfer tape, remove it slowly at a 45-degree angle. Press down any loose areas and work out remaining air bubbles. Your decal is now ready to display your support for Illinois law enforcement.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are State of Illinois Thin Blue Line Decals?

State of Illinois thin blue line decals are vinyl graphics featuring the outline of Illinois with the symbolic thin blue line design. These decals are made from durable vinyl material that adheres to smooth surfaces like glass, metal, plastic, and painted surfaces. They are commonly used on vehicles, windows, and walls to show support for Illinois law enforcement officers. The decals are typically die-cut to the precise shape of Illinois and designed for both indoor and outdoor applications with weather-resistant properties.

Order Your State of Illinois Law Enforcement Support Decals

Ready to show your support for Illinois law enforcement? Our State of Illinois thin blue line decals provide a durable and meaningful way to display your appreciation for the officers who serve Illinois communities. With over 100 law enforcement agencies across the state, these decals represent your support for all Illinois officers.

Choose from multiple sizes to fit your vehicle, window, or display location. Each decal maintains the accurate proportions of Illinois while featuring the respected thin blue line design. Our premium vinyl construction ensures your decal will maintain its appearance through weather and regular use.

Place your order today using our online configurator, or contact our customer service team at 320-391-5250 for assistance with custom sizing or bulk orders. We're here to help you show your Illinois law enforcement support with quality decals that last.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

State of Illinois Thin Blue Line Decal FAQs

How long do State of Illinois decals last outdoors?

State of Illinois thin blue line decals typically last 3-5 years outdoors when applied to clean, smooth surfaces like vehicle paint, glass, or metal. The durable vinyl material resists fading, cracking, and weather damage when properly installed and maintained.

What surfaces work best for State of Illinois decals?

State of Illinois decals adhere best to smooth, non-porous surfaces including glass, metal, plastic, and painted surfaces. Clean vehicle surfaces, windows, laptops, and smooth walls provide excellent adhesion for long-lasting installation.

Are State of Illinois decals available in different sizes?

Yes, State of Illinois thin blue line decals are available in multiple sizes while maintaining accurate state proportions. Common sizes include 5-inch measurements at the widest or highest point, with custom sizing available for specific applications.

Can State of Illinois decals be removed without damage?

State of Illinois decals can typically be removed from most surfaces without permanent damage when removed properly. Gentle heat from a hair dryer helps soften the adhesive, making removal easier. Some adhesive residue may remain and can be cleaned with adhesive remover.

Do State of Illinois decals come with installation instructions?

Yes, each State of Illinois decal order includes detailed installation instructions with step-by-step guidance for proper surface preparation, positioning, application, and transfer tape removal to ensure professional results.

What material are State of Illinois thin blue line decals made from?

State of Illinois decals are manufactured from premium vinyl material designed for durability and weather resistance. The matte finish provides professional appearance while the strong adhesive ensures reliable bonding to approved surfaces.

Can I order State of Illinois decals in bulk quantities?

Yes, State of Illinois thin blue line decals are available in bulk quantities for departments, organizations, or group orders. Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5250 to discuss volume pricing and custom requirements for larger orders.
